text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is Miho Dormitory's beloved dorm
leader—a hot-blooded runner with a passion for
one-on-one challenges.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To her, races aren't just about running, they're
about the fiery competition with fearsome rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's excited to see what challenges await her in
the upcoming Twinkle Series. Now, it's time to
charge into battle with her!
